name: Texas Sheet Cake # 2
recipeInstructions:
Boil water, margarine, and cocoa for two minutes. Add the remaining ingredients and mix until well combined. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 20 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean. Allow the cake to cool for five minutes before slicing and icing.
Icing Instructions:
Boil milk, cocoa, and margarine for one minute. Remove from heat and stir in powdered sugar and vanilla until smooth. Spread over the cooled cake.
